description: Delete obsolete drag-drop components and legacy interactive builders replaced by Families A-U, refactor chart components, and rebuild 8 core simulations on the practice.v1 contract.
deviation_notes: Phase 1 complete: Deleted 11 obsolete components and 10 test files. Phase 2 complete: Fixed BreakEvenChart prop/state sync bug, variableCostRate clamping, FinancialDashboard currency formatting unification, added charts barrel export and chart-types unit tests.
